text:
In May 2026,
FunTech will celebrate its 10th anniversary.
When we started,
we were almost a student-led company.
None of us came from
major advertising agencies or fine art universities.
Yet we were able to grow,through sheer effort,
into the creative company we are proud of today.
This was only possible
thanks to the trust and support
of our clients and partners
who chose to work with us.
We are deeply grateful.
Thank you.

Over the next decade,
we will step into a broader field:
creative branding,
on a larger stage than ever before.
As the starting point of that challenge,
we renewed our own CI.
If this renewal helps you
sense our strength
in designing craft and language
powered by technology,
then it is a perfect score for us.

We will continue to fully explore
every emerging technology
of the moment
and relentlessly pursue creativity
that sends a jolt of electricity
through you.
Please look forward
to what’s next.
And we sincerely appreciate
your continued support.
